title: DID support (did:web + did:key) for persona identity
description: Add decentralized identifier support to broadside personas, compatible with gaja and smallhold implementations. Each persona gets an Ed25519 recovery keypair encoded as did:key (multicodec 0xed01 + base58btc, z6Mk... prefix) and a did:web derived from domain. DID documents served at /users/{username}/did.json per W3C DID v1. Actor documents include alsoKnownAs with both DIDs. BIP-39 24-word mnemonic for recovery phrase.
design: Compatible with gaja did.rs and smallhold did.rs: same did:key encoding (ed25519 multicodec + base58btc), same did:web format (did:web:{domain}:users:{username}), same DID document structure (W3C DID v1 context, RsaVerificationKey2018 + Ed25519VerificationKey2020 verification methods), same BIP-39 mnemonic format. No did:plc (AT Protocol specific to gaja). Recovery is per-persona since broadside has no user accounts.
